title: Rey Milo
overview: A portrait of Milo Lockett, the most prolific Argentine plastic artist of recent times. Loved by some and hated by others, Milo lives like a rock star and paints like there's no tomorrow. His life in his hometown of the Chaco is based on his philanthropic activities. A film essay on art, business, vocation and solidarity.
